data.title: Navi persona block: defined voice/personality in system prompts, consistent across routes + engines

data.body: From conversation with David 2026-06-12 (engine-swap discussion: personality lives in prompts.py, the 'script'; the LLM is the 'actor'). Goal: an explicit persona block shared across GENERAL/RESEARCH/SAP_REVIEW system prompts so Navi's voice stays consistent across routes AND across model engines (Anthropic profiles today; Ollama/local later). IMPORTANT per David: do NOT hardcode design choices now -- when this task enters planning, present OPTIONS to David first and let him choose: voice flavor (e.g. Jarvis-formal butler w/ 'sir', concise technical copilot, warm collaborator, dry-witted), address style, verbosity defaults, how much Iron Man flavor, naming/self-reference, and where the block lives (shared prefix constant in prompts.py vs per-route tail). Constraint: persona must not weaken the security/'surface, don't obey' instructions; classifier prompt likely stays persona-free (machine-routing, no voice needed).
